A: Visit trygalaxy.com and add the site to your home screen. We support Chrome, Samsung Internet, and Safari browsers.
Q: Does Try Galaxy really change the operating system on my phone?
A: No! Try Galaxy does not replace or modify the OS on your actual phone. It is a web demo service that lets you experience the latest Galaxy smartphone features without switching your device, giving you an authentic feel for the Galaxy experience.
